introSection: Dip the Dips Scenic Railway was a wooden roller coaster located at Cedar Point in Sandusky, Ohio, USA. It opened in 1908 and was closed in 1917 to make way for the Leap Frog Railway.
fullText: Dip the Dips Scenic Railway was a wooden roller coaster located at Cedar Point in Sandusky, Ohio, USA. It opened in 1908 and was closed in 1917 to make way for the Leap Frog Railway.
